title: My Brother Fired Me At 60 After I Deferred Salary For 30 Years. So I Became His Boss.
description: I spent 30 years as my brother's bookkeeper on his vow I'd be a partner. On my 60th birthday he fired me and bragged about a $2.4M sale. I tipped off the IRS about unpaid taxes, bought his distressed debt for pennies, and now he reports to me every Monday. #Karma #FamilyBetrayal #BossMove
thumb_text: HE FIRED ME AT 60. NOW HE CALLS ME BOSS.

thumb_lines.text: HE NEVER PAID MY SOCIAL SECURITY FOR 10 YEARS
